summary: The diff implements all three requirements (REQ-11, REQ-12, REQ-13) with a new ProfilePage.tsx, updated App.tsx route registration, and updated Header.tsx. All major acceptance criteria appear to be addressed: /profile route exists, auth state display, sign-in/sign-out, abbreviated principal, My Orders section with order lookup, OrderStatusTimeline reuse, and profile link in both desktop and mobile navigation with visual highlighting when authenticated.
